title: peltophorus forficulatus
intro: Peltophorus forficulatus, also known as the Mopane worm tree or the Marula worm tree, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Peltophorus forficulatus include its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and crushed to make infusions, teas, or decoctions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
